_comment: Template for enabling agent teams. Copy relevant sections to settings.local.json

_teammateMode_options.auto: Uses split panes if in tmux, otherwise in-process
_teammateMode_options.in-process: All teammates in main terminal (Shift+Down to cycle)
_teammateMode_options.tmux: Each teammate gets its own pane (requires tmux or iTerm2)

_hooks_for_teams.TeammateIdle: Runs when a teammate is about to go idle. Exit code 2 to send feedback.
_hooks_for_teams.TaskCompleted: Runs when a task is being marked complete. Exit code 2 to prevent completion.
